Notice Of And Motion To Transfer Venue To Contra Costa County
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Transfer Venue To Contra Costa County.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
